reports.title: markitdown
reports.title_zh: MarkItDown — 文件转Markdown转换工具
reports.summary: 微软开源的Python工具，用于将文件和Office文档转换为Markdown格式，支持多种文档格式的批量转换。
reports.content: A Python tool for converting files and office documents (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, PDF) to Markdown format. Built by Microsoft with contributions from multiple developers. Features batch conversion, table preservation, and image extraction support.

reports.title: Archon
reports.title_zh: Archon — 开源AI编程测试框架
reports.summary: 首个开源的AI编程测试框架构建器，可以让AI编程变得确定性和可重复，提升编程效率。
reports.content: The first open-source harness builder for AI coding. Makes AI coding deterministic and repeatable. Built with TypeScript, supports multiple AI models including Claude. Allows creating test harnesses for AI-generated code.

reports.title: hermes-agent
reports.title_zh: Hermes Agent — 成长型AI代理框架
reports.summary: 一款能够随着使用不断学习和成长的AI代理框架，支持多种任务执行和记忆管理。
reports.content: The agent that grows with you. An open-source AI agent framework that learns from interactions and improves over time. Features memory management, task decomposition, and multi-model support.

reports.title: rowboat
reports.title_zh: Rowboat — 带记忆功能的AI同事
reports.summary: 开源的AI同事系统，具有记忆功能，可以在团队中扮演协作者角色，记住对话上下文。
reports.content: Open-source AI coworker with memory. A TypeScript-based AI agent that can collaborate with users in team settings, maintaining context and memory across sessions for continuous assistance.

reports.title: multica
reports.title_zh: Multica — 开源托管AI代理平台
reports.summary: 开源托管AI代理平台，可以将编程AI代理变成真正的团队成员，支持任务分配、进度跟踪和技能积累。
reports.content: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills. Built with TypeScript, supports multiple AI coding agents.

reports.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
reports.title_zh: Karpathy技能笔记 — 提升Claude Code表现
reports.summary: 基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编程陷阱的观察，整理出的单一CLAUDE.md文件，用于改善Claude Code的编程表现。
reports.content: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls. Contains best practices and prompts distilled from years of AI programming experience.

reports.title: Kronos
reports.title_zh: Kronos — 金融市场语言基础模型
reports.summary: 金融市场的语言基础模型，专门用于理解和分析金融市场的文本数据、新闻和报告。
reports.content: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets. Trained on financial texts, news, and reports to understand and analyze financial market data.

reports.title: DeepTutor
reports.title_zh: DeepTutor — 原生代理个性化学习助手
reports.summary: 面向代理原生的个性化学习助手，利用AI技术为用户提供定制化的学习体验和辅导服务。
reports.content: DeepTutor: Agent-Native Personalized Learning Assistant. An AI-powered learning system designed for agent-based interactions, providing personalized educational experiences through adaptive tutoring.

reports.title: opendataloader-pdf
reports.title_zh: OpenDataLoader PDF — AI就绪的PDF解析器
reports.summary: 开源PDF解析工具，专为AI应用设计，可以自动提取PDF内容并使其易于AI处理，同时支持PDF无障碍访问。
reports.content: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source tool that extracts content from PDFs and converts it into formats suitable for AI processing and analysis.

reports.title: superpowers
reports.title_zh: Superpowers — 代理技能框架与开发方法论
reports.summary: 一套代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，让AI编程代理能够更高效地完成软件开发任务。
reports.content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works. Provides structured approaches for deploying AI coding agents in real software development workflows.

reports.title: 1D Chess
reports.title_zh: 一维国际象棋
reports.summary: 一个极具创意的变体国际象棋游戏，将棋盘压缩成一维线条，同时保留了象棋的核心策略乐趣。
reports.content: HN Score: 618, Comments: 117

reports.title: WireGuard makes new Windows release following Microsoft signing resolution
reports.title_zh: WireGuard发布新Windows版本，解决微软签名问题
reports.summary: WireGuard在解决微软代码签名问题后，发布了全新的Windows版本，VPN协议更加稳定安全。
reports.content: HN Score: 379, Comments: 104

reports.title: CPU-Z and HWMonitor compromised

reports.content: HN Score: 240, Comments: 81

reports.title: Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in eight-year 'civil war'

reports.title_zh: Bluesky 2026年4月服务中断复盘报告

reports.title: Claude Cowork expands enterprise tools with Zoom transcript integration
reports.title_zh: Anthropic扩展Claude Cowork企业功能：支持Zoom会议转录
reports.summary: Anthropic为Claude Cowork企业版推出新功能，可以将Zoom会议转录内容自动转换为可执行的任务清单，提升团队协作效率。

reports.title: Jeff Bezos' AI lab Project Prometheus poaches xAI cofounder from OpenAI
reports.title_zh: 贝索斯AI实验室Project Prometheus挖角OpenAI
reports.summary: 由Jeff Bezos领投的AI创业项目Project Prometheus挖来了xAI联合创始人Kyle Kozic，将专注于基础设施建设，目标是用AI改进制造业。

reports.title: Anthropic signs big AI infrastructure deal with Google and Broadcom
reports.title_zh: Anthropic与Google和Broadcom签署大型AI基础设施协议
reports.summary: Anthropic宣布与Google和Broadcom达成重大合作，将获得多个千兆瓦的下一代TPU计算资源，预计2027年投入使用以支持Claude前沿模型训练。公司还透露其年化收入已超过300亿美元。

reports.title: Google launches free offline AI dictation app Google AI Edge Eloquent
reports.title_zh: 谷歌推出免费离线AI录音转写应用
reports.summary: 谷歌发布免费离线AI转录应用Google AI Edge Eloquent，无需订阅即可使用，结束后会自动润色讲话内容、过滤填充词。目前仅支持iOS，未来将扩展到Android和macOS。

reports.title: OpenAI releases framework for AI child safety policies
reports.title_zh: OpenAI发布AI儿童安全政策框架
reports.summary: OpenAI发布AI儿童安全政策蓝图，与NCMEC和总检察长联盟合作制定，旨在推动应对AI生成儿童性虐待材料相关法规的现代化，改善举报流程并建立防止剥削尝试的系统。
